description: Framework-agnostic core models: run state, commands, events, message envelopes, tool DTOs. Pure value objects with no infrastructure dependencies.

subNamespaces.description: Run lifecycle value objects — RunId, RunHandle, RunState, RunStatus, StartRunInput.
Command value objects — CoreCommandKind constants, PendingCommand, RoutedCommand with core/extension/rejected discrimination.
Event sourcing models — RunEvent, Outbox pattern (Entry/Sink), BoundaryHookEvent/Name, CoreLifecycleEventType with validation, Lifecycle sub-namespace for typed events.

Message bus envelopes — AgentMessage, MessageBag, bus commands (StartRun, AdvanceRun, ApplyCommand, ExecuteLlmStep, ExecuteToolCall, CollectToolBatch), results (LlmStepResult, ToolCallResult), outbox projections.
Tool execution value objects — ToolCall, ToolDefinition, ToolResult, execution modes, provider request/result, before/after hook contexts and results, model resolution.
